notes: TASK execution context: outbound task_depends_on_task at depth 2 surfaces the precondition chain + cross-substrate FGAPs the task closes (via the same relation_type carrying TASK→project:FGAP sentinel edges); inbound feature_depends_on_item at depth 1 surfaces the FEAT this TASK implements + (via the same relation_type) the DEC/MODE/FB items the FEAT depends on. Composes the bundle a coder needs at TASK-002 dispatch time: which TASK precedes me, which FEAT I serve, which FGAPs I close, which DECs the FEAT realizes.
